personal_info.name: Somaya Mahmoud
personal_info.title: Flutter Developer | Cross-Platform Mobile Applications
personal_info.about_me: A Flutter Developer with +3 years of experience building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Proficient in state management, Firebase integration, and applying clean architecture principles. Committed to delivering intuitive user experiences and collaborating effectively to achieve project goals.

technical_skills: RESTful APIs, Firebase, Hive, and SQLite
OOP, SOLID Principles and Design Patterns

experience.title: Remote Flutter Developer

Focused on Clean Architecture, Bloc for state management, and API integration.
Enhanced UI/UX for a seamless and engaging user experience.

Applied Clean Architecture, Bloc state management, and API integration with enhanced UI/UX.

projects.name: Ele Quiz
projects.short_description: Ele Quiz is a quiz application that helps users test and improve their knowledge in web and mobile development topics such as HTML, CSS, Flutter, and JavaScript.
projects.description:
Ele Quiz is an educational quiz application designed to help users test and improve their knowledge in different programming topics. The app provides interactive quizzes covering subjects such as HTML, CSS, Flutter, and JavaScript.

It offers a simple and user-friendly interface that allows users to answer questions, track their progress, and strengthen their understanding of key development concepts. The project demonstrates the use of Flutter for building responsive and interactive mobile applications.
features: User-Friendly Interface: Simple and intuitive design for a smooth experience.
Browse Quizzes by Subject: Easily find quizzes organized by subject.
Search for Quizzes: Quickly locate specific quizzes using the search feature.
Take Timed Quizzes: Challenge yourself with quizzes with a time limit.
Review Results: View results instantly and identify mistakes.
Learn from Mistakes: Get feedback on incorrect answers to improve learning.

projects.name: Flowery Store
projects.short_description: Flowery App is a Flutter e-commerce application offering a smooth and intuitive shopping experience for floral products.
projects.description: Flowery App provides a seamless shopping experience for floral enthusiasts. Browse a variety of floral products, add them to your cart, and track your orders effortlessly.
features: User Authentication: Secure login and registration functionality.
Product Browsing: Explore a wide range of floral products.
Search Functionality: Quickly find products using the search feature.
Shopping Cart: Add products to the cart and proceed to checkout.
Order Tracking: Monitor the status of your orders.
technologies_used: Flutter: Cross-platform framework for building the app.
Firebase: Used for authentication, database, and notifications.
Provider: State management for efficient UI updates.
REST API: Backend integration for product data and order management.
Git & GitHub: Version control and collaboration.
CI/CD Pipelines: Automated build and deployment using GitHub Actions.
Responsive Design: Ensures optimal user experience on all devices.
Google Play Store Optimization: Feature graphics and descriptions tailored for better visibility.
